loyalist.victory_condition: Protect the Lord and ensure the Lord's victory.

rebel.victory_condition: Defeat the Lord and overthrow their rule.

spy.victory_condition: Outlast all players, leaving the Lord as the final 1v1 challenge, then defeat the Lord to be the lone survivor.

phases.description: Trigger phase before Judgement where specific character skills activate.

rules.duplicate_stratagem_restriction: Same card cannot exist in a single player's judgement zone simultaneously.

rules.action: Discard 1 card for each excess card in hand.

phases.description: Trigger phase after Discard where specific character skills activate.

distance.base_calculation: Shortest physical path between active players (clockwise or counterclockwise).
distance.eliminated_player_effect: Eliminated players no longer occupy a position; distance shortens.

damage_vs_deduction.damage: Has a source (the player who used the card). Triggers damage-related skills.
damage_vs_deduction.hp_deduction: Lacks a source. Does not trigger skills activated by receiving damage.

dying_and_defeat.settlement_priority: Dying event must be settled prior to completing the Damage event.

defeat_rebel.reward: Any player who defeats a Rebel draws 3 cards.

lord_defeats_loyalist.punishment: The Lord must discard all cards in their hand and equipment zone.

Attack.target: Another player within your Attack Range
Attack.effect: Inflicts 1 damage on the target player.

Dodge.action_window: When an incoming [Attack] begins its settlement.

Peach.action_window: During the Play Phase or when a player is in a Dying State.
Peach.target: Self (during Play Phase if HP is not full) or Any dying player.

Wine.action_window: During the Play Phase or when the holder enters a Dying State.
Wine.effect: If played in Play Phase: Damage +1 on your next [Attack] this turn. If played in Dying State: The holder recovers 1 HP.

Weapon.replacement_rule: Must discard current weapon before equipping a new one.
Weapon.primary_effect: Modifies Attack Range and alters offensive capability.

Armor.replacement_rule: Must discard current armor before equipping a new one.

Offensive (-1).effect: Distance -1 when you attempt to reach other players. Minimum limit is 1.

Defensive (+1).effect: Distance +1 when other players attempt to reach you.

Mount.combination_rule: Can equip one +1 mount and one -1 mount simultaneously, but cannot duplicate names or types.

game_vocabulary_appendix.Obtain: Take random card if from Hand; Take card of choice if from Equipment or Judgement Zone.
game_vocabulary_appendix.Lose: Card is removed from Hand or Equipment Zone.
game_vocabulary_appendix.Use_Play_As: Convert properties of card(s) into another. Retains original properties after settlement cycle.
game_vocabulary_appendix.Exhibit: Show designated card to all players, then place it back.
game_vocabulary_appendix.Reveal: Show designated card to all players until settlement is complete.
game_vocabulary_appendix.Ignore: Player is unaffected by the event.
game_vocabulary_appendix.One_Injury: The injury event resulting from a single instance of damage, regardless of amount.
game_vocabulary_appendix.1_Damage: Amount of damage points. Skills triggering on '1 Damage' trigger multiple times if multiple points are dealt.
game_vocabulary_appendix.Regarded_as: View properties or events differently under specific criteria without changing base conversion.
game_vocabulary_appendix.Next_Player: The player to the current player's right side.
game_vocabulary_appendix.Transferring: Changing card ownership face down (or face up if required).
game_vocabulary_appendix.Substitution: Replace target card with a different card. Replaced card goes to Discard Pile.
game_vocabulary_appendix.Shift: Changing the target or recipient of a card or effect.
